{{Quote|The man makes much noise with his too-pink mouth. He speaks as though he has power and authority, which Farg supposes he might. The Focela is a man of some importance, as he controls the flow of information. He found something objectionable about Farg's presence, but a donation to the coffers of Novania quieted the Arkanian fool's mouth, at least for a time. All the while, the Focela remained reasonable. Farg was almost disappointed that killing did not prove necessary.|[[Vaskau Farg]]|<ref name="Arkanian Chill">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030206arkanianintro|text=Arkanian Chill|int=Arkanian Chill}}</ref>}}
'''Hyrim Focela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|Security]] [[Security Master|Master]] of [[Novania]]. He was middle aged, arrogant, had never been in a fight in his life, and wanted to keep things that way. Controlling the flow of information in and out of the community, he often had the best interest of the people at heart.
